name: Kids Pizza Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the muffins in half.
2. Spread tomato sauce on each half of the muffin.
3. Top with mushrooms, pepperoni, black olives, or any other combination of your favorite toppings.
4. Sprinkle shredded Mozzarella cheese over the toppings.
5. Place the pizza muffin in the microwave.
6. Cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
